articles.author: Mike Florio
articles.title: Texas Tech booster Cody Campbell on Brendan Sorsby backlash: "They don't want to play us" - NBC Sports
articles.description: The Brendan Sorsby saga has put billionaire Texas Tech booster Cody Campbell in a pickle.
articles.content: The Brendan Sorsby saga has put billionaire Texas Tech booster Cody Campbell in a pickle. Should he seize on the court ruling that restored Sorsbys eligibility as more evidence of the necessity of fe… [+3502 chars]
